summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. All P3 features (Web Push Notifications and Player Transfer History) working correctly. 15/15 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Push Notification Infrastructure fully implemented with VAPID keys in backend/.env
GET /api/push/vapid-key returns correct VAPID public key
POST /api/push/subscribe creates push subscription in MongoDB push_subscriptions collection
POST /api/admin/push/test requires auth (401 without) and sends test push
GET /api/admin/push/stats requires auth and returns subscriber stats
Service worker sw-push.js accessible at /sw-push.js with push event handlers
Frontend Navigation has Bell/BellOff icon for push toggle (data-testid='push-notification-bell')
Auto-push triggers on live match status change and goals (send_push_to_all in server.py)
Transfer Model includes all required fields: player_id, player_name, from_team, to_team, transfer_date, transfer_type, fee, notes
POST /api/admin/players/{id}/transfer requires auth (401 without) and creates transfer record
Admin Panel Players tab has ArrowLeftRight transfer button for each player
Transfer modal has fields: type (Αποχώρηση/Απόκτηση/Δανεισμός), date, from/to team, fee, notes
Player Profile Biography tab shows transfer history section (ΙΣΤΟΡΙΚΟ ΜΕΤΑΓΡΑΦΩΝ)
Transfer types display in Greek: Απόκτηση (In), Αποχώρηση (Out), Δανεισμός (Εισ./Εξ.) (Loan In/Out)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test transfers during testing (TEST_Transfer_Team, Test Origin, Test Destination)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified P3 features: 1) Push Notification Infrastructure - VAPID keys in .env, GET /api/push/vapid-key returns public key, POST /api/push/subscribe/unsubscribe work, GET /api/push/subscribers-count returns count, admin endpoints require auth, sw-push.js service worker accessible, Bell icon in navigation toggles push subscription, auto-push on live match events. 2) Player Transfer History - GET /api/transfers returns list, POST /api/admin/players/{id}/transfer requires auth and creates record, Admin Players tab has ArrowLeftRight transfer button, transfer modal has type/date/from/to/fee/notes fields, Player Profile Biography tab shows ΙΣΤΟΡΙΚΟ ΜΕΤΑΓΡΑΦΩΝ section with Greek labels (Απόκτηση, Αποχώρηση, Δανεισμός).

Service worker /sw-push.js.details: Accessible and contains push event handlers

POST /api/admin/players/{id}/transfer wi.details: Creates transfer record with all fields

Transfer record fields.details: Includes player_name, from_team, to_team, transfer_date, transfer_type, fee

Admin Players tab transfer button.details: ArrowLeftRight icon visible for each player

Transfer modal fields.details: Type (In/Out/Loan), date, from/to team, fee, notes

Player Profile transfer history.details: Biography tab shows ΙΣΤΟΡΙΚΟ ΜΕΤΑΓΡΑΦΩΝ section
